title: Rim Thickness (Rim)
text: Rim Thickness (Rim) Thickness of the meter scale relative to the widget as a whole. Allowed values are integers or floating point numbers. Default is 5 percent or 2 pixels, whichever is greater. Rim = " Number " Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(METER) = "rim=10" Copy Applies To umeter (Meter) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
